campaign_concept.name: Enterprise AI Launch 2026
campaign_concept.objective: Generate 500 qualified enterprise leads for AI platform in Q3 2026
campaign_concept.description: B2B demand generation campaign targeting enterprise IT decision-makers
campaign_concept.target_audience: CTO, CIO, VP Engineering at companies 500+ employees

agt03_concept.name: The AI Advantage
agt03_concept.strategic_narrative: Hyperscalers win on scale; we win on enterprise-grade reliability and white-glove onboarding.

audience_segmentation.primary: CTOs and CIOs at 500-5000 employee companies

channel_mix.competitor_gap: Competitors underbid on long-tail enterprise terms

message_architecture.master_message: Your enterprise deserves AI that works

campaign_phasing.awareness: Weeks 1-4: Thought leadership content + LinkedIn ABM
campaign_phasing.conversion: Weeks 9-12: Free trial offers + sales handoff

tone_board.visual_direction: Deep navy and white, data visualization aesthetics, executive photography
